title: Robustly Spicy Greek Chicken Skewers
description: A spicy and crispy Greek dish featuring enchilada sauce and shio-koji-cure, perfect for a keto-friendly dinner
instructions: Preheat the grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic powder, onion powder, salt, and black pepper
Add the chicken pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade
Thread the marinated chicken pieces onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the chicken is cooked through
While the chicken is cooking, mix the enchilada sauce and shio-koji in a small bowl
Brush the enchilada sauce mixture onto the chicken during the last 2 minutes of cooking
Remove the skewers from the grill and sprinkle with chopped parsley
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired
